    let b = BigInt(base);
    let e = BigInt(exp);

    while (e > 0n) {
        if (e % 2n === 1n) {
            res = (res * b) % m;
        }
        b = (b * b) % m;
        e /= 2n;
    }
    return Number(res);

            res = (res * b) % m;
        }
        b = (b * b) % m;
        e /= 2n;
    }
    return Number(res);
